# Public API surface of pkg/compliancekit, regenerated by cmd/genapi.
#
# Adding, renaming, or removing an exported identifier is a SemVer-
# significant change. The CI gate (`go run ./cmd/genapi -check`) fails
# the build when this file drifts from the package source, so a
# contract change cannot land without an explicit, reviewed diff to
# this file.
#
# v1.0 baseline lands incrementally across the phase commits — the
# initial Phase 0 commit ships the gate and an empty contract;
# subsequent phases promote one type family at a time.

const SeverityCritical
const SeverityHigh
const SeverityInfo
const SeverityLow
const SeverityMedium
const SeverityUnknown Severity
const StatusError Status
const StatusFail Status
const StatusPass Status
const StatusSkip Status
func NewResourceGraph() *ResourceGraph
func ParseSeverity(s string) (Severity, error)
func ParseStatus(s string) (Status, error)
method (*ResourceGraph) Add(r Resource)
method (*ResourceGraph) All() []Resource
method (*ResourceGraph) ByID(id string) (Resource, bool)
method (*ResourceGraph) ByType(t string) []Resource
method (*ResourceGraph) Count() int
method (*ResourceGraph) Query(expr string) ([]Resource, error)
method (*ResourceGraph) Related(r Resource, edge string) []Resource
method (*Severity) UnmarshalJSON(b []byte) error
method (*WaiverRef) DaysUntilExpiry(t time.Time) int
method (*WaiverRef) IsActive(t time.Time) bool
method (Resource) Attr(key string) string
method (Resource) AttrBool(key string) bool
method (Resource) AttrInt(key string) int
method (Resource) HasTag(tag string) bool
method (Resource) Ref() ResourceRef
method (Severity) MarshalJSON() ([]byte, error)
method (Severity) String() string
method (Status) IsActionable() bool
type EvidencePtr struct
type Package struct
type Resource struct
type ResourceGraph struct
type ResourceRef struct
type Secret struct
type Severity int
type Status string
type Vulnerability struct
type WaiverRef struct
